name: Asian-Style Salmon Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1.5 pounds Salmon, skinned, boned and cut into ¾ inch cubes
½ pound Snow peas (if large, cut in half)
1 red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine 2 tablespoons of the oyster sauce with vinegar, ginger, soy sauce and 1 clove garlic. Season with pepper if desired. Add fish, turning to coat. Cover and refrigerate at least half an hour.
2. Heat 2 teaspoons of oil in a nonstick skillet or seasoned wok over high heat. Add remaining garlic and stir fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add sprouts, peas, green onions, and red pepper. Stir-fry until tender-crisp, about 2 minutes.
4. Stir in the remaining 1 tablespoon of oyster sauce, sesame oil, sugar, and pepper.
5. Remove from skillet and set aside.
6. Drain fish, discarding the marinade. Heat remaining oil in the same skillet. Add fish and stir-fry for about four minutes or until done.
7. Add vegetables and gently toss to heat through. Serve immediately.
